$comment: Parity-recovery loss contract: every lossy note migrateNotebookV1 emits for the live notebook.json must match one of these approved classes (substring match); anything else fails the suite. Stage 4 eliminated the recoverable classes — what remains is either intentional or a documented equivalence.

approved.why: authored easing curves have no locomotion-solver home; speed/tempo ARE preserved ({speed}), and the solver's fixed profile is the documented equivalence
approved.restoredBy: n/a — accepted equivalence (Stage 5 tunes global motion feel)

approved.why: owner-authored weight 0 = deliberately out of the pool (not a loss)
defensive: a target shape outside the v1 vocabulary coarsens to the destination anchor rather than crashing the migration
approved.restoredBy: n/a — defensive fallback (none occur in the live doc)

approved.why: defensive: raw {cx,cy} camera focus has no TargetRef home — approximated as the destination and reported (none occur in the live doc)
